org.docgene.help.gui.swing

Class AbstractSwingEngineManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.help.gui.swing.AbstractSwingEngineManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EngineManager
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SwingJFXEngineManager, SwingSwingEngineManager

    public abstract class AbstractSwingEngineManager
extends java.lang.Object
implements EngineManager
    An abstract swing Engine manager.

      • update

        public void update()
        Description copied from interface: EngineManager
        Update the engine manager. Typically you have to call this method if you changed the model with an existing engine manager.
        Specified by:
        update in interface EngineManager
